    "Voltage glove class is incorrect for the system voltage",
    "Voltage gloves are overdue for their periodic dielectric testing"

    "Stop work immediately",
    "Procure and inspect voltage-rated gloves of the correct class for the system voltage",

  "rationale": "Using voltage-rated gloves that are either the incorrect class for the system voltage or are overdue for their mandatory periodic testing violates OSHA and NFPA 70E safety standards, presenting an immediate, critical risk of electrocution or shock to the technician.",
